title: Eva character Triads
wikitext:
[]: Eva character Triads             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 20, 2006 2:31 pm Here what I've gathered so far from various sites as well as what I see, correct me if you'd say some of these combs/ways of seeing the characters need tweaking: Gendou/Shinji/Rei= Father/Son/Holy Spirit, Christian Trinity Psychology: Id/Ego/Superego, with this, I'd say several characters fit the bill: ~Shinji/Asuka/Rei ~Rei/Asuka/Misato Either way combo-wise, in EoE, Shinji is effect, trying to kill his Ego. That's an interesting way to view their realtionship ;) ~Hikari/Toji/Kensuke (might have the order wrong with that) ...I wouldn't be suprised if either the 3 Reis could mean something, or at least Yui/Rei/Kaworu, though I'm not sure what... And maybe I'm reading too much into this, but...Third Impact, Third Children and Rei III?? (As well as the Three Children being involved in it somehow) You think 3 is an important number in that show or am I just thinking too much?

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Nov 20, 2006 2:37 pm Well, this all depends on how someone sees it. And I'll bet that there are plenty more hidden meanings in this anime. I like the sexual angel one.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Mon Nov 20, 2006 3:22 pm There are too many for just one to be relevant. You could apply this to almost ANY show.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Nov 20, 2006 5:02 pm Szmitten wrote: There are too many for just one to be relevant. You could apply this to almost ANY show.

[]: Re: Eva character Triads             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 20, 2006 5:56 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Gendou/Shinji/Rei= Father/Son/Holy Spirit, Christian Trinity

[]: Re: Eva character Triads             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 20, 2006 6:10 pm Reichu wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Gendou/Shinji/Rei= Father/Son/Holy Spirit, Christian Trinity

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 20, 2006 8:07 pm *snickers at picture* Good point. ;

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 20, 2006 9:01 pm Innit that supposed to be Joseph, Mary, and Jeebus? Based on some famous artwork.

That's an interesting way to view their realtionship ;) ~Hikari/Toji/Kensuke (might have the order wrong with that) ...I wouldn't be suprised if either the 3 Reis could mean something, or at least Yui/Rei/Kaworu, though I'm not sure what... (As well as the Three Children being involved in it somehow) You think 3 is an important number in that show or am I just thinking too much?
